reviews.comment:
El ACA es excelente en cualquier lugar del país!! Particularmente en Caleu Caleu, Río Colorado, La Pampa, es pintoresco y de muy buen servicio!!

(Translated by Google)
The ACA is excellent anywhere in the country! Particularly in Caleu Caleu, Río Colorado, La Pampa, it's picturesque and has very good service!

Cómodo a mano.
Me atendieron bien estaba abierto  eso me pareció muy bien. Y los precios bastante bien.

Conveniently located.
I received good service and it was open, which I appreciated. And the prices were quite reasonable.

reviews.comment:
Me gustó: la habitación cómoda y limpia. Desayuno excelente!
No me gustó: la colcha manchada.

(Translated by Google)
I liked: the comfortable and clean room. Excellent breakfast!
I didn't like: the stained bedspread.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena! Lugar para repostar el tanque y en un apartado, un motel para descansar. Punto intermedio de paraje. Para tener en cuenta.

(Translated by Google)
Very good! A place to refuel and, in a secluded spot, a motel to rest. A good midway point in the area. Worth keeping in mind.
